Wiki / Flavors & combos

Flavors & combos

50 flavors to unlock and 25 combos to discover. Flavors set your income ceiling; combos reward you for loading the right ones together.

The menu

Flavors

There are 50 flavors (46 standard + 4 seasonal). Each has an income multiplier, an unlock cost, and a color. Flavor unlocking opens at Level 1; costs and multipliers climb steeply as you move up the tiers.

TierExample flavorsMultiplier range
StarterChocolate, Vanilla, Strawberry, Blueberry, Banana, Peach×1 – ×2.2
EarlyCherry, Watermelon, Pineapple, Matcha, Mint, Caramel×4.7 – ×16
MidMelon, Coffee, Bubblegum, Cheesecake, Hazelnut, Cookies×25 – ×70
LateTiramisu, Lava, Stardust, Galaxy, Dragon, Phantom×100 – ×600+
CosmicRainbow, Void, Celestial, Phoenix, Cosmic, Eternalhuge
SeasonalRose Cream, Tropical Mango, Pumpkin Spice, Candy Caneevent-only

Flavor slots: you can keep several flavors active at once. The Flavor Slots upgrade expands you to a maximum of 5 active flavors — enough to chase the biggest combos.

A flavor's multiplier feeds the mix multiplier (the sum of your active flavors' multipliers), so loading higher-tier flavors raises every shake's payout. Seasonal flavors are all ×5 and free — they exist for their combos, not raw multiplier.

Complete list

All 46 standard flavors

Every standard flavor in unlock order, with its income multiplier and cash unlock cost. (The 4 seasonal flavors below are free and unlock only during their events.)

1Chocolate×1Free

Seasonal flavors

FlavorMultiplierUnlocks during
Rose Cream×5Valentine
Tropical Mango×5Summer
Pumpkin Spice×5Halloween
Candy Cane×5Christmas
Combos

All 25 combos

When the listed flavors are all active in the blender together, the combo applies a flat income bonus. 21 are permanent; 4 are seasonal.

ComboFlavorsBonus
Classic BlendChocolate + Vanilla+10%
Zen GardenMatcha + Mint+14%
Tropical ZenPineapple + Matcha+14%
Peach & LavenderPeach + Lavender+16%
Turtle SwirlChocolate + Caramel+18%
Neapolitan SupremeChocolate + Vanilla + Strawberry+20%
Spicy CaramelLava + Caramel+20%
Bubblegum BlissBubblegum + Cheesecake+20%
Mixed Berry MedleyBlueberry + Cherry + Strawberry+22%
Caramel MacchiatoCaramel + Coffee+25%
Cookies & CoffeeCookies + Coffee+25%
Tropical ParadiseBanana + Watermelon + Peach+26%
Salted Caramel CrunchSalted Caramel + Cookies+28%
Shadow BlendVoid + Phantom+32%
Café SpecialTiramisu + Hazelnut + Coffee+35%
Dragon InfernoLava + Dragon+38%
Cosmic FrostStardust + Galaxy + Phantom+48%
Nebula DreamRainbow + Stardust + Galaxy+55%
Void StaticVoid + Neon + Phantom+62%
Divine BlendUltimate + Celestial+78%
Phoenix CosmosPhoenix + Cosmic+100%

Seasonal combos

ComboFlavorsBonusSeason
Love PotionRose Cream + Strawberry+25%Valentine
Summer RushTropical Mango + Pineapple+25%Summer
Haunted HarvestPumpkin Spice + Void+30%Halloween
Winter WondershakeCandy Cane + Marshmallow+30%Christmas
Rotation

Featured combo & seasonal flavors

Featured combo

A spotlighted combo rotates every 50 game-days, granting a temporary +30% income bonus while it's featured. Keep its flavors loaded to cash in.

Seasonal flavors

Four seasonal events unlock a special flavor + combo during their real-world window: Rose Cream (Valentine), Tropical Mango (Summer), Pumpkin Spice (Halloween), and Candy Cane (Christmas). Once unlocked they're yours permanently.

Combo strategy

With 5 slots you can often satisfy a 2-flavor and a 3-flavor combo at once, and even overlap flavors between them. High-tier combos also need high-tier flavors — so combos give your cosmic flavors a second payoff.
